records.question: Which employees living at 1241 W 72nd Pl have a supervisor among the other employees?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN employee AS employee__1 ON employee.supervisor = employee__1.employee_id
WHERE employee.address = '1241 W 72nd Pl'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.employee_id
FROM employee e
WHERE e.address = '1241 W 72nd Pl'
AND e.supervisor IS NOT NULL
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM employee e2
    WHERE e2.employee_id = e.supervisor
)

records.question: Which employees named Valeria work as Sanitarians at 4033 N Kenneth Ave in Chicago with a zip code of at least 60641 and earn a salary of at most 84800?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
WHERE employee.zip >= 60641 AND employee.address = '4033 N Kenneth Ave' AND employee.city = 'Chicago' AND employee.salary <= 84800 AND employee.title = 'Sanitarian' AND employee.first_name = 'Valeria'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id
FROM employee
WHERE first_name = 'Valeria'
  AND title = 'Sanitarian'
  AND address = '4033 N Kenneth Ave'
  AND city = 'Chicago'
  AND zip >= 60641
  AND salary <= 84800

records.question: Which employees with the last name Langley earn at most 63500 and have supervisors who themselves report to another supervisor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN employee AS employee__1 ON employee.supervisor = employee__1.employee_id
JOIN employee AS employee__2 ON employee__1.supervisor = employee__2.employee_id
WHERE employee.salary <= 63500 AND employee.last_name = 'Langley'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.employee_id
FROM employee e
WHERE e.last_name = 'Langley'
  AND e.salary <= 63500
  AND e.supervisor IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM employee supervisor
    WHERE supervisor.employee_id = e.supervisor
      AND supervisor.supervisor IS NOT NULL
  )

records.question: Who works at 7723 S Paxton Ave and reports to a supervisor whose own supervisor is also an employee?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN employee AS employee__1 ON employee.supervisor = employee__1.employee_id
JOIN employee AS employee__2 ON employee__1.supervisor = employee__2.employee_id
WHERE employee.address = '7723 S Paxton Ave'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e1.employee_id
FROM employee e1
WHERE e1.address = '7723 S Paxton Ave'
AND e1.supervisor IS NOT NULL
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM employee e2
    WHERE e2.employee_id = e1.supervisor
    AND e2.supervisor IS NOT NULL
)
